string-array.name: answer_arr
string-array.item: Xunyou Game Turbo built in Game Space/XArena is a product specifically designed for TECNO/Infinix to improve the game network stability. It can solve the problems of high latency, disconnection, etc. and make the network smoother and the game more stable. It supports Wi-Fi and other data networks (5G/4G/3G).
The game turbo already supports most games. If some games cannot be boosted, you can contact online customer service for support.
TECNO/Infinix ID is the account of the player using the Xunyou Game Turbo services in the Game Space/XArena. Each account can get relevant free benefits and boost services after login.
1. Refresh to check the payment network. 2. Check whether the balance of the payment account is sufficient to support the payment.
Please tap the link below to read the %1$s and %2$s.

string-array.name: question_arr
string-array.item: What is the function of the game turbo?
What games does the game turbo support?
What account is bound to the game turbo?
Where to read the Privacy Policy and User Agreement?
